_meta.description: First-sentence families for grounded answers. The goal is to open from the right angle without sounding templated, salesy, or overly stage-managed.

runtimeUsageNotes.consumer: style decision resolver and compose style contract prompt
runtimeUsageNotes.intent: Choose a useful entry point: answer, scope, metric, quote, delta, status, or stabilizing frame. These are starter families, not lines to repeat verbatim.

direct_answer.purpose: Answer first when the user asked a direct question and the evidence is good.
en: {{answer}}, based on the material in view.
{{answer}} if we stay with the document as written.
pt: {{answer}}, olhando apenas para o material em vista.
{{answer}} se ficarmos no que o documento diz.

scope_anchor.purpose: Start by narrowing the scope before answering.
en: On the portion you asked about, {{answer}}.

evidence_anchor.purpose: Lead with what the evidence supports when a quote or record matters.
en: What the document actually says points to {{answer}}.
The clearest reading of the cited text is {{answer}}.
pt: O que o documento realmente diz aponta para {{answer}}.
A leitura mais clara do trecho citado e {{answer}}.

bottom_line.purpose: Executive opener that leads with the decision signal.
en: {{answer}}, and that is the part that matters most.
pt: {{answer}}, e essa e a parte que mais importa.

en: What changes the call here is {{answer}}.
The point that should drive the decision is {{answer}}.
pt: O que muda a decisao e {{answer}}.
O ponto que deve orientar a decisao e {{answer}}.

finding_then_support.purpose: Analyst opener that states the finding before evidence.
en: {{answer}}. The support for that reading comes from {{supportAnchor}}.
{{answer}}. The record lines up behind that through {{supportAnchor}}.
pt: {{answer}}. O suporte para essa leitura vem de {{supportAnchor}}.
{{answer}}. O registro converge para isso por meio de {{supportAnchor}}.

comparison_frame.purpose: Open a compare answer with the lens, not with file-name recitation.
en: Between the two versions, the important shift is {{delta}}.
What changes most between them is {{delta}}.
pt: Entre as duas versoes, a mudanca importante e {{delta}}.
O que mais muda entre elas e {{delta}}.

qualified_claim.purpose: Start with a bounded interpretation when certainty is not absolute.
en: The stronger reading is {{answer}}, with one limit.
On this record, {{answer}}, although one boundary remains.
The document leans toward {{answer}}, not full certainty.
pt: A leitura mais forte e {{answer}}, com um limite.
Nesse registro, {{answer}}, embora uma fronteira permaneca.
O documento pende para {{answer}}, sem chegar a certeza total.

stabilize_then_answer.purpose: Sensitive-topic opener that lowers temperature while staying concrete.
en: The safest grounded reading here is {{answer}}.
pt: A leitura ancorada mais segura aqui e {{answer}}.

clear_limit.purpose: Lead with a clear interpretive boundary.
en: The document goes as far as {{answer}}, but not beyond that.
What can be said cleanly is {{answer}}.
The text supports {{answer}}, and stops there.
pt: O documento vai ate {{answer}}, mas nao alem disso.
O que pode ser dito com clareza e {{answer}}.
O texto sustenta {{answer}}, e para ai.

clause_anchor.purpose: Legal opener that roots the answer in controlling language.
en: The clause reads most naturally as {{answer}}.
pt: A clausula se le de forma mais natural como {{answer}}.

metric_anchor.purpose: Finance opener that surfaces the number or direction immediately.
en: The number that moves here is {{metric}}: {{delta}}.
The clearest financial signal is {{metric}}, which is {{delta}}.
pt: O numero que se move aqui e {{metric}}: {{delta}}.
O sinal financeiro mais claro e {{metric}}, que esta {{delta}}.

delta_first.purpose: Compare opener that privileges change over setup.
pt: O que mais se moveu foi {{delta}}.

risk_signal.purpose: Lead with the most material risk or exposure.
en: The issue with the most practical consequence is {{risk}}.
pt: O problema com maior consequencia pratica e {{risk}}.

status_first.purpose: Operational opener that states the current state immediately.

pt: O que esta travando isso e {{blocker}}.

next_action.purpose: Operational opener that starts with the next move.

pt: A versao curta em linguagem simples e {{answer}}.

simple_framing.purpose: Explain the lens before translating the answer.
en: If we strip this down to the key point, {{answer}}.
The easiest way to read this is {{answer}}.
pt: Se reduzirmos isso ao ponto principal, {{answer}}.
A forma mais simples de ler isso e {{answer}}.

rules.trigger: Draft opens with overt template phrase
rules.check: output.firstSentence IN ['Short answer:', 'The main difference is']

rules.trigger: Opening angle does not fit the task
